title: Crunchy Barramundi Wrap
description: A simple and tasty fish wrap recipe with crunchy slaw and fresh herbs. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner or lunch.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
2. Season the barramundi with salt and pepper.
3. Add the barramundi to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes per side.
4. While the fish is cooking, prepare the crunchy slaw by mixing the corn, crunchy slaw, and fresh cilantro.
5. Warm the American wraps in the microwave or in a dry pan.
6. Assemble the wraps by placing a cooked barramundi fillet on the bottom half of the wrap, followed by the crunchy slaw mixture.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve immediately with a lime wedge on the side.
